properties.name: Bore hole pipe
properties.description: Main water supply from the borehole. 1.5" HDPE, Class D (thicker, higher-pressure).

properties.name: School garden width pipe
properties.description: Runs the full width of the school garden plot, from the corner nearest the water tower to the far corner, servicing one tap at that far corner. The original surveyed pipe only reached partway; extended straight to the corner. 1.5" HDPE, Class C distribution line.

properties.name: School garden length pipe
properties.description: Runs the full length of the school garden plot from the water tower corner, feeding 4 taps that branch about halfway into the plot's width. 1.5" HDPE.

properties.name: Main women's garden pipe
properties.description: Main line through the middle of the women's garden. 1.5" HDPE, Class C distribution line — about 90 m to the far end of the women's garden side.

properties.name: Scoop sub pipe
properties.description: Runs the length of a garden bed.
